commonProblems.h2: Nissan Altra Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Nissan Altra (R'nessa) petrol engines - SR20DE, SR20DET and KA24DE - dominate UK replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this section to decide whether repair or replacement offers better value for your specific issue.

problems.group: Nissan Altra SR20DE Timing Chain Rattle
problems.h4: Nissan Altra SR20DE Timing Chain Rattle - Why Early SR20 Engines Fail
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Altra R'nessa 2.0 G, 2.0 G Auto (1997-2001, SR20DE)
problems.rootCause: Original timing chain tensioner loses hydraulic pressure, allowing chain slap and guide wear that can lead to catastrophic interference if ignored.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner, guides and chain before failure
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if caught early; 40-60k mile extension

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded tensioner, bench tested

problems.recommendation: If your SR20DE is rattling on cold start but still runs, a preventative chain kit from a specialist offers excellent value. If the chain has jumped or valves are bent, replacement is the only viable option.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt SR20DE engine prices for your Nissan Altra

problems.group: Nissan Altra KA24DE Head Gasket Failure
problems.h4: Nissan Altra KA24DE Head Gasket Failure - Coolant Loss & Overheating
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Altra R'nessa 2.4 X, 2.4 X 4WD (1999-2001, KA24DE)
problems.rootCause: Cylinder head warping from thermal cycling combined with original gasket material breakdown, allowing coolant into combustion chambers.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove head, machine surface, fit multi-layer steel gasket
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block is undamaged; 30-50k mile expectation

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with MLS gasket, pressure tested
repairOptions.longevity: Definitive solution; addresses block wear too

problems.recommendation: For KA24DE units showing white smoke or coolant loss, get a compression test first. If bores are scored, replacement is more cost-effective than repeated head repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for KA24DE Nissan Altra engine replacement

problems.h4: Nissan Altra SR20DET Turbo Failure - Blue Smoke & Power Loss
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Altra R'nessa 2.0 GT Turbo (1998-2001, SR20DET)
problems.rootCause: Turbocharger journal bearing wear from oil starvation or coked oil lines, causing shaft play, seal failure and loss of boost pressure.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove turbo, refurbish or replace with reconditioned unit
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if engine internals are healthy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded turbo, oil lines checked
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if engine has other wear; warranty included

problems.recommendation: If your SR20DET is smoking blue under boost but compression is good, a quality turbo rebuild is cost-effective. If the engine has high mileage or oil consumption, full replacement prevents repeat failures.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt SR20DET engine prices for your Nissan Altra

problems.group: Nissan Altra EM18 Electric Motor Controller Fault
problems.h4: Nissan Altra EM18 Electric Motor Controller Fault - Power Loss & No Start
problems.rootCause: Inverter/controller electronics degradation from thermal cycling and moisture ingress, causing intermittent or complete loss of drive power.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnose inverter, repair PCB or source replacement unit
repairOptions.longevity: Viable for fleet vehicles; requires EV specialist

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt motor/controller assembly, battery health check
repairOptions.longevity: Only option for severe degradation; limited supplier availability

problems.recommendation: Due to the extreme rarity of Altra EV units, we recommend contacting our network first to confirm specialist availability before committing to repair. Battery health must be assessed alongside motor issues.
problems.cta: Enquire about EM18 Nissan Altra EV motor availability

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Nissan Altra
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're dealing with SR20DE timing chain noise, KA24DE head gasket failure, or SR20DET turbo issues, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Nissan Altra specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare quotes today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Nissan Altra Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Nissan Altra and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

items.title: Nissan Altra Petrol Engines
items.description: Petrol engines dominate the Nissan Altra (R'nessa) replacement market, with SR20DE, SR20DET and KA24DE units covering all UK import variants from 1997-2001.
items.descriptor: Petrol engines dominate the Nissan Altra (R'nessa) replacement market, with SR20DE, SR20DET and KA24DE units covering all UK import variants from 1997-2001.
items.familiesLabel: Common Nissan Altra Petrol Engine Families
families: SR20DE - standard 2.0L unit (R'nessa 2.0 G), timing chain tensioner wear common
SR20DET - turbo performance variant (GT), turbo oil seal failures under boost
KA24DE - 2.4L 4WD engine (R'nessa X), head gasket failure at high mileage
knownFor: SR20DE: Reliable if timing chain maintained; rattling on cold start is warning sign
SR20DET: Strong performance but turbo requires quality oil and regular checks
KA24DE: Robust torque but prone to head gasket failure in UK climate

items.descriptor: The EM18 electric motor powered the ultra-rare Altra EV fleet vehicle (1998-2002), with replacement requiring specialist EV knowledge due to extremely limited UK availability.
families: EM18 - 62kW motor/controller assembly for Altra EV fleet variants
Single-speed reduction gear driven by permanent magnet synchronous motor
Lithium-ion battery pack (approx. 30-35 kWh) mounted under floor
Regenerative braking recovers energy to extend urban range
importantNotes: Only ~200 Altra EV units produced globally; UK numbers extremely low
Replacement requires specialist with EM18 experience; standard garages cannot service
Battery health must be assessed alongside motor condition for accurate quoting

engineYears.h2: Nissan Altra Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Nissan Altra (R'nessa) production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The R'nessa launched with the SR20DE 2.0L petrol engine, establishing the baseline powertrain for UK import variants.
keyChanges: Introduction of N30 chassis with SR20DE 2.0L petrol engine
Front-wheel drive layout with automatic or manual transmission options
Early ECU mapping specific to Japanese domestic market specifications
knownFor: Reliable SR20DE block but early tensioner design prone to wear
JDM ECU may require adaptation for UK fuel and emissions
Good parts interchangeability with UK-market Primera SR20 units
years.cta: Get quotes for 1997-1998 Nissan Altra replacement engines
years.ticker: Nissan R'nessa SR20DE engine replacement • SR20DE timing chain rattle fix • R'nessa 2.0 G engine cost UK

years.description: The SR20DET turbo engine debuted in the R'nessa GT, while the ultra-rare Altra EV introduced the EM18 electric motor for fleet applications.
keyChanges: SR20DET turbo engine added for R'nessa GT performance variant
Altra EV launched with EM18 electric motor and lithium battery pack
Minor ECU revisions for turbo boost control and emissions
knownFor: SR20DET delivers strong performance but requires diligent oil maintenance
EM18 availability extremely limited; specialist sourcing essential
Turbo variants command premium pricing in replacement market
years.cta: Get quotes for 1998-1999 Nissan Altra replacement engines
years.ticker: R'nessa GT SR20DET turbo replacement • Altra EV EM18 motor availability • SR20DET blue smoke fix

years.description: The larger KA24DE 2.4L engine was introduced for 4WD R'nessa X variants, while facelift models received updated sensors and ECU mapping.
keyChanges: KA24DE 2.4L engine added for R'nessa 2.4 X 4WD variants
Facelift updates to wiring looms and sensor connectors
Revised engine mounts for improved NVH in later production
knownFor: KA24DE offers robust torque but head gasket failure common at high mileage
Facelift models have improved wiring but sensor compatibility must be verified
4WD variants require specific sump and mount configuration
years.cta: Get quotes for 1999-2001 Nissan Altra replacement engines
years.ticker: R'nessa 2.4 X KA24DE head gasket • Facelift SR20DE wiring compatibility • 4WD sump for R'nessa engine

years.description: The final year of Altra EV production saw minimal changes, with EM18 electric motor units becoming increasingly scarce in the UK replacement market.
keyChanges: Final production year for Altra EV with EM18 motor
No significant engineering changes; focus on fleet support
Increasing scarcity of replacement EM18 units in UK
mainEngines: EM18 - electric motor (Altra EV final units)
knownFor: Extreme rarity makes EM18 replacement a specialist-only proposition
Battery degradation is primary concern over motor failure
Fleet operators should plan for long lead times on parts
years.cta: Enquire about 2002 Nissan Altra EV engine availability

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Nissan Altra was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a minimum 12‑month warranty from UK Nissan Altra specialists.

faq.h2: Nissan Altra Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: Is the Nissan Altra the same as the R'nessa?
items.answer: Yes, the Nissan Altra is the electric variant of the R'nessa (chassis N30). Most UK replacement enquiries target the petrol R'nessa variants using SR20DE, SR20DET or KA24DE engines.
keyPoints: Altra EV used EM18 electric motor; R'nessa used petrol engines
Both share N30 chassis, body panels and many components
Search using both names to capture all UK stock listings
items.cta: Compare Nissan Altra and R'nessa engine prices today

items.question: Will a Nissan Primera SR20DE fit my R'nessa?
items.answer: Generally yes, the SR20DE from UK-market Primera shares the same block architecture, but wiring loom, mounts and ancillaries may require adaptation for R'nessa fitment.
keyPoints: Core engine block and head are interchangeable between models
R'nessa-specific sump, mounts and wiring may need swapping
Always verify transmission bellhousing pattern matches your gearbox
items.cta: Get quotes for SR20DE engines compatible with Nissan R'nessa

items.question: How much to replace Nissan R'nessa engine UK?
items.answer: Rebuilt SR20DE engines typically cost £800-£1,800 supply-only; fitted prices add £400-£900 labour. SR20DET and KA24DE units command higher pricing due to complexity.
keyPoints: Supply-only pricing excludes fitting, fluids and road test
Turbo SR20DET units cost £1,200-£2,500 due to turbocharger value
Always request itemised quotes showing warranty terms and inclusions
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Nissan R'nessa engine prices from UK specialists

items.question: Does the Nissan Altra EV use a petrol engine?
items.answer: No, the Altra EV exclusively used the EM18 electric motor. Petrol engines (SR20/KA24) were fitted only to R'nessa variants, not the Altra EV badge.
keyPoints: Altra EV = electric only; R'nessa = petrol only
EM18 replacement requires EV specialist; very limited UK availability
Confirm your VIN before ordering to avoid incompatible engine purchase
items.cta: Enquire about EM18 electric motor availability for Nissan Altra EV

items.question: Where to find a KA24DE engine in UK?
items.answer: KA24DE engines are sourced through specialist Japanese import breakers and UK Nissan specialists. Availability is moderate but lead times of 2-4 weeks are common.
keyPoints: Request compression test reports before committing to purchase
Verify 2WD vs 4WD sump configuration matches your R'nessa variant
Rebuilt units with upgraded head gasket offer best long-term value
items.cta: Find KA24DE engine suppliers for Nissan R'nessa 2.4 X

items.question: What is the engine code for Nissan R'nessa GT?
items.answer: The R'nessa GT Turbo uses the SR20DET engine code. Non-turbo GT variants (if specified) would use SR20DE, but UK imports are predominantly turbo.
keyPoints: SR20DET = turbocharged; SR20DE = naturally aspirated
Check engine bay plaque or VIN decoder for definitive identification
Turbo variants require specific oil, cooling and exhaust considerations
items.cta: Get quotes for SR20DET Nissan R'nessa GT engine replacement

items.question: Can I fit an SR20DET into a non-turbo R'nessa?
items.answer: Yes, but it requires significant modification: turbo plumbing, intercooler, ECU, wiring loom and exhaust upgrades. Most owners find buying a GT donor more cost-effective.
keyPoints: Engine mounts and transmission may bolt up directly
Fuel system, ECU and wiring require extensive adaptation
Professional tuning essential to avoid engine damage post-conversion
items.cta: Compare SR20DET swap packages for Nissan R'nessa conversion

items.question: Do you supply the 4WD sump for R'nessa?
items.answer: Yes, our network includes specialists who stock R'nessa-specific 4WD sumps for KA24DE and SR20DE engines. Always confirm drivetrain configuration when ordering.
keyPoints: 4WD sumps have different pickup location and mounting points
Using a 2WD sump on 4WD can cause oil starvation under cornering
Include chassis code (N30) and variant when requesting quotes
items.cta: Find Nissan R'nessa 4WD engine sump suppliers UK

items.question: Is the Nissan R'nessa engine reliable?
items.answer: SR20DE and KA24DE are fundamentally robust engines if maintained; common failures (timing chain, head gasket) are well-documented and addressable with rebuilt units.
keyPoints: Regular oil changes critical for SR20 timing chain longevity
KA24DE benefits from upgraded multi-layer steel head gasket
Rebuilt engines with component upgrades offer best reliability
items.cta: Compare reliable rebuilt engines for Nissan R'nessa UK

items.question: What warranty on Nissan R'nessa engines?
items.answer: Engines supplied through EngineMarket carry a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Always confirm exact terms, coverage exclusions and approved fitting requirements with your chosen supplier.
keyPoints: Warranty typically covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Fitting by non-approved workshop may void warranty coverage
Keep all invoices and compression test reports for warranty claims
items.cta: Get Nissan R'nessa engine quotes with 12-month warranty included
